name: Daki
description:
"You will pay for what you have done!"

So, hello everyone again. The Nezuko bot couldn't come out for a while because of my laziness, and also because of some plans for the distant future. Namely, I've compiled a list of 80 BOTS, and this is the first of them. In particular, these are anime bots, although some of them are from games or TV series (literally one or two, probably, idk), some of them will be quite large, one even has 6 characters (spoiler: a genshin bot, I borrowed the idea from one person, here's a link, support him). This is also without taking into account the New Year's series of bots: "Christmas Rush", consisting of 12 bots. I have a lot of plans, and now I'll slowly start to deal with it all. First of all, I'll make all the desired bots for Demon Slayer: Daki (this bot), Tengen's wives, Shinobu X Mitsuri, Shinobu X Tomioka (bonus, school setting lol). Next up will be: One Piece and Chainsaw Man. And in every first bot of a new fandom I will continue to spoil and talk about the next two (when One Piece comes I will throw in Chainsaw Man and the next fandom and so on and so forth). That's it, I think I've said everything. Thank you for the 200+ subscribers already, I'm very glad that you support me and communicate with my bots, one has already gained 11k. All the best, silwnt was with you!

Art: Shexyo (X / Patreon)

(fandom tag: Kimetsu No Yaiba / Demon Slayer)
creator: silwnthero
